description_long: This is a classic three-arm candelabrum made of tarnished metal, featuring a central vertical stem with two gracefully curved arms extending symmetrically from either side. Each arm, as well as the central stem, supports a candle holder with a stub of white candle, giving the object an antique and slightly weathered appearance. The base is broad and polygonal, providing stability and a touch of geometric elegance. The surface of the metal is mottled with patches of discoloration, suggesting age and frequent use. The overall design is utilitarian yet decorative, suitable for both functional lighting and ornamental purposes. The lamp's proportions and style evoke traditional street or table candelabra often found in historic urban settings.
description: A tarnished metal three-arm candelabrum with white candle stubs and a broad polygonal base, featuring an antique, weathered look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three candle holders and the symmetrical, curved arms extending from the central stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the arms and the thickness of the central stem, with two candle holders visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the full spread of the arms and the polygonal base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the arm depth and the candle holders in profile, with the base's shape clearly visible.
